name: sixflags-mcp
description: Six Flags MCP server for Claude — live wait times, park hours, shows, and day planning (Carowinds and the whole chain)
author: Claude Code (AI) <https://www.anthropic.com/claude>

scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --external:dotenv --banner:js='import { createRequire as __createRequire } from "module"; const require = __createRequire(import.meta.url);' --outfile=dist/bundle.js
